topics.title: Remove keyboard shortcut for resetting the game
topics.trigger: The game previously allowed players to reset mid-game by pressing a key, which may have caused accidental resets during play. This change removes that shortcut and updates the on-screen instructions to match.
topics.response:
- In `src/main.ts`, the key handler block that called `startNewGame()` when the player pressed the reset key was removed entirely, eliminating the keyboard-triggered reset path.
- In `index.html`, the controls hint text was updated to remove the mention of the reset key, keeping the displayed instructions accurate.
- Also in `src/main.ts`, a line that explicitly hid the pause overlay when starting a new game was removed, likely made redundant by other game-state management logic.
topics.decisions: Removing the reset shortcut entirely, rather than rebinding it to a different key, keeps the control scheme simpler and eliminates the risk of players accidentally wiping their game state mid-run. The on-screen hint was updated in the same change to avoid misleading players about available controls.
